sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the left hand, rated 6 out of 10. He also reports multiple nighttime awakenings and diarrhea last week. The patient reports urinary hesitancy and nighttime urination. He denies burning urination.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 128/78. Heart rate is 82. Temperature is 98.6°F. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are concerning for possible urinary tract infection and are impacting his quality of life. A urologist consultation is warranted.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor will reach out to the urologist to schedule a consultation. Recommend increased oral hydration.
